sections.name: section_navbar
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper(L1) > main-wrapper(L2) > section_navbar(L3) > padding-global(L4) > container-large(L5) > padding-section-small(L6) > navbar_component(L7)

sections.name: section_privacy_content
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper(L1) > main-wrapper(L2) > section_privacy(L3) > padding-global(L4) > container-large(L5) > padding-section-large(L6) > privacy_component(L7)

sections.name: section_footer
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper(L1) > main-wrapper(L2) > section_footer(L3) > padding-global(L4) > container-large(L5) > padding-section-medium(L6) > footer_component(L7)

fixes_applied: Hard reset page. Removed all previous unsemantic elements.
Phase 1: Created Webflow color variables from Figma HEX codes.
Phase 2: Created semantic 7-layer structural classes (padding-global, padding-section, container-large) prior to HTML injection.
Phase 2: Created independent Base Typography classes and explicit Combo Classes.
Phase 3: Constructed DOM explicitly with pre-registered classes to prevent auto-generated '-1' suffixes.
